LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER PAULO NARANJO'S PETITION FOR A WRIT OF ADMINSTRATIVE MANDATE IS DENIED. PETITIONER HAS SHOWN NO BASIS TO OVERTURN THE FINAL DETERMINATION OF THE UIAB. EVEN TO THE EXTENT ANY OF THE ACTIONS OF THE EDD OR ADMINISTRATIVE LAW JUDGE ARE PROPERLY REVIEWABLE, PETITIONER HAS NOT SHOWN THEY COMMITTED ANY ERROR. THE PETITIONER IS REQUESTING A STATEMENT OF DECISION IN THIS MATTER. THE COURT ASKED RESPONDENT'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE STATEMENT OF DECISION IN ELECTRONIC FORM (WORD FORMAT) GIVING MR. NARANJO AN OPPORTUNITY TO SUBMIT ANY ALTERNATIVE LANGUAGE OR PROPOSAL TO THE STATEMENT OF DECISION. THIS MATTER STAND SUBMITTED UNTIL THE RECEIPT OF THE STATEMENT OF DECISION. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

APPEARANCES - PAULO NARANJO, TEL. NO. 359-8733 PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. HADARA STANTON, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. 703-5561 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER PAULO NARANJO'S Petition For A Writ Of Adminstrative Mandate IS DENIED. PETITIONER HAS SHOWN NO BASIS TO OVERTURN THE FINAL DETERMINATION OF THE U I A B. EVEN TO THE EXTENT ANY OF THE ACTIONS OF THE E D D OR ADMINISTRATIVE LAW JUDGE ARE PROPERLY REVIEWABLE, PETITIONER HAS NOT SHOWN THEY COMMITTED ANY ERROR.
